case_title: JUAN CARLOS MEZA DE LA TORRE VS. KARINA KOTOVAYA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY MEZZA DE LA TORRE, JUAN CARLOS KOTOVAYA, KARINA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MEZZA DE LA TORRE, JUAN CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT KOTOVAYA, KARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF DUE TO EMERGENCY TO MAR-15-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUAN CARLOS MEZA DE LA TORRE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARINA KOTOVAYA IS PRESENT WITH A WITNESS. WHEN TAKING ATTENDANCE AT 3:30 P.M. PLAINTIFF CONTACTED DEPT 506 BY PHONE INFORMING COURT THAT HE HAS GOT INTO A CAR ACCIDENT AND ASKING IF COURT CAN WAIT OR ALLOW TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL. DEFENDANT AGREES TO CONTINUE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO BE PRESENT. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO FEB-08-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JUAN CARLOS MEZA DE LA TORRE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARINA KOTOVAYA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS BOE GEIS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND SERVED THE DOCUMENTS SERVED NOV-02-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOTOVAYA, KARINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-05-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUAN CARLOS MEZZA DE LA TORRE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT KARINA KOTOVAYA, IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS REQUST FOR CONTINUANCE. PARTIES MAY SUBMIT A REQUEST ZOOM APPEARANCE NO LATER THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE DATE OF THE NEXT TRIAL. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE PURSUANT TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEZZA DE LA TORRE, JUAN CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KOTOVAYA, KARINA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
